collection.name: The Sinking Ship
collection.description: 44,444 pixel-art salvage records from the wreck everyone abandoned. The world sees a sinking ship. You see a salvage operation. Hope never sinks.

minting.did: TODO: project DID (spec 5.4) — set before testnet11 dry run
minting.royalty_address: TODO: royalty XCH address — set before testnet11 dry run

notes: OQ-8: collection.id is a placeholder slug; CHIP-0007 examples use a UUID and marketplaces treat it as an opaque unique string. Owner to confirm final id format before mint.

OQ-9: series_total is the 44,444 cap; under The Scuttling the realized supply will be lower. CHIP-0007 has no post-hoc mutation story — series_total is committed pre-mint at the cap. Flagged for the fairness docs.
icon/banner/website point at the live GitHub Pages site until a custom domain is cut over; DID and royalty XCH address remain owner-supplied before testnet11.
